title: Prototype parallel index build in production
description: Implement optional parallel index building for Python and Rust while preserving deterministic ordering. Validate with existing Behave/cucumber specs and benchmarks.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented parallel index build while preserving deterministic order: python/src/taskulus/index.py uses ThreadPoolExecutor with ordered map; rust/src/index.rs uses threaded read with indexed ordering and sequential index insertion. No tests run yet.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Ran tests: cd python && python -m behave (28 features passed, 207 scenarios passed, 8 skipped); cd rust && cargo test --test cucumber (pass). Benchmarks not run yet.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Ran python3 tools/check_benchmarks.py: status ok. Results: python build_ms 64.15, cache_load_ms 13.57; rust build_ms 45.46, cache_load_ms 4.35. Discovery serial/parallel metrics captured in output. Cleaned tools/tmp afterward.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Index build can run in parallel without changing output order; specs pass for Python and Rust; benchmarks record any change.
